title: Blueprint Command Console
concept: A dense Blueprint-first command deck for power users that keeps the live WordPress shell protected while centralizing Blueprint gallery search, selected detail, URL runs, JSON editing, replace-current warnings, local-folder saving, and portability transfer history.
flows: Search and filter a representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery entries, select a Blueprint, inspect and edit JSON, validate, copy, download, and run with explicit replace-current confirmation.
Run a Blueprint replacement end to end with warning, cancel option, confirmation, progress, preview mutation, path update, database size change, and transfer history entry.

Save an Unsaved Playground to a local directory end to end with folder picker state, permission grant, file-copy progress, selected folder identity, local storage badge, saved row mutation, and reload consequence.
Generate a ZIP download end to end with active-source status, progress, generated archive result, and transfer history mutation.

Launch or import through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import routes with route-specific inputs and constraints.

Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and Blueprint bundle actions while the live shell stays visible.
Manage saved, local, and temporary Playgrounds with open/manage affordances, rename mutation, delete confirmation, delete cancellation, final fallback state, and visible object identity.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview
GitHub import with account connection and token persistence caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser model and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Selected Blueprint detail with description and categories
Blueprint JSON editor with dirty, validation, copy, download, run, progress, replacement warning, and result state
Save in this browser with file-copy progress and browser identity
Save to a local directory with folder picker, permission state, progress, folder identity, local badge, and reconnect consequence
Saved, local-directory, imported, and unsaved Playground object list
Open/manage, rename, delete confirmation, delete cancel, final row/fallback state
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local state, Save, and reset/reload consequences
WordPress, PHP, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save, and result history
Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with a realistic PHP notice
Export to GitHub and GitHub import
ZIP import and ZIP download
Database download and Blueprint bundle portability actions
Transfer history for saves, Blueprint runs, imports, exports, downloads, and manager actions
